posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran has rejected a temporary ceasefire proposal and said it has formulated a response to the US’ demands to end the war, per Reuters.

Iran's Foreign Ministry says they will announce their response to the US’ 15-point plan "when necessary."
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: These people are cooks. Fraudsters. Please report
